final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit wide, 2-to-1 demultiplexer. When the select line (sel) is 0, the output (out) takes the value of input b; when sel is 1, the output reflects the value of input a.
module top_module(
  output reg [3:0] out,
  input sel,
  input [3:0] a,
  input [3:0] b
);always @(*) begin
    if(sel == 1'b0) begin
      out = a;
    end else begin
      out = b;
    end
  end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit wide, 2-to-1 demultiplexer. When the select line (sel) is 0, the output (out) takes the value of input b; when sel is 1, the output reflects the value of input a.
